---
title: "changing my monitor's refresh rate"
date: 2009-01-21
forum: General Help
---

### Post by Jofarmer on 2009-01-21
I am trying the set my monitor's refresh rate to 72 (3x24).

I sticked to the [How-To]("http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=83973"), used the [online modeline generator]("http://www.dkfz-heidelberg.de/spec/linux/modeline/") and now my xorg.conf looks like this:
```
# xorg.conf (X.Org X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool,
using
# values from the debconf database.
#
# Edit this file with caution, and see the xorg.conf manual page.
# (Type "man xorg.conf" at the shell prompt.)
#
# This file is automatically updated on xserver-xorg package upgrades
*only*
# if it has not been modified since the last upgrade of the xserver-xorg
# package.
#
# Note that some configuration settings that could be done previously
# in this file, now are automatically configured by the server and
settings
# here are ignored.
#
# If you have edited this file but would like it to be automatically
updated
# again, run the following command:
#   sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg

Section "Monitor"
        Identifier      "205BW"
        HorizSync       30-81
        VertRefresh     56-75
        # V-freq: 72.00 Hz  // h-freq: 79.01 KHz
        Modeline "1680x1050" 194.08  1680 1784 2016 2456  1050 1050 1053 1097 

EndSection

Section "Screen"
        Identifier      "Default Screen"
        Monitor         "205BW"
        Device          "GeForce 7300"
        DefaultDepth    24
        Subsection "Display"
                Depth   24
                Modes   "1680x1050_60"
        EndSubSection
        Subsection "Display"
                Depth   24
                Modes   "1680x1050_50"
        EndSubSection
        Subsection "Display"
                Depth   24
                Modes   "1680x1050_72"
        EndSubSection
EndSection

Section "Module"
        Load    "glx"
EndSection

Section "Device"
        Identifier      "GeForce 7300"
        Driver  "nvidia"
        Option  "NoLogo"        "True"
EndSection
```

Still in System->Settings->Screen Resolution (translated from German, so something like that on English systems) it only shows up as unknown Monitor with only one option: 50Hz. I checked the German [Samsung website]("http://monitor.samsung.de/produkte/detail2_main.aspx?guid=79812383-AEA4-43D5-920B-5F1F860EC614") for the correct settings.
Any idea what I am missing here?
